title: hypericum quadrangulum var. dubium
intro: Hypericum quadrangulum var. dubium is a variant of the lesser St. John's Wort, a flowering plant species in the St. John's Wort family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hypericum quadrangulum var. dubium include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce anxiety and depression, and exhibit antimicrobial properties to combat infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile ingredient in natural remedies.
